suite.name: suite S1779531276952 2

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: TC_001 Login With Valid Credentials And Verify Success
test.doc: TC_001 — User logs in with valid credentials and is redirected to home page with products and welcome message displayed
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${BASE_URL}' not found.

test.name: TC_002 Add Multiple Products To Cart And Verify Count
test.doc: TC_002 — User adds 3 different products to cart and verifies cart badge shows 3 with correct items present
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${BASE_URL}' not found.

test.name: TC_003 Sort Products By Price Low To High And Verify Order
test.doc: TC_003 — User selects price low to high sort option and verifies products are reordered in ascending price order
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${BASE_URL}' not found.

suite.status: Suite setup failed: Variable '${BASE_URL}' not found.
